Activity Sheet
Group ID:CV-2
Sheet No:1
Participants:Uday Madankar & Samarth Thonge
Project Title:Derma Alternative Finder
Activities Observed in the Field
  • Patients collecting hand-written prescriptions loaded with high-cost branded dermatology products — creams, gels, serums, ointments.
  • At pharmacies, patients quoted ₹600–₹2,500 for a single tube with no mention of generic equivalents.
  • Patients spending 20–30 min searching Google for 'cheap alternative to [brand]' — finding mostly unreliable forum posts.
  • Pharmacists upselling branded products due to higher margin incentives, not disclosing that equivalent generic salts exist.
  • Patients purchasing only half the prescribed quantity to afford the bill — leading to incomplete, ineffective treatment.
  • Doctors unaware of the financial impact their brand-specific prescriptions have on lower-income patients.
📋 Product Concept: A web/app-based tool where patients type or photograph a brand name from their prescription and instantly receive a verified list of generic alternatives with salt composition, dosage, price comparison, and savings estimate.
Effect on Product & Sketch / Photo
  • The app must perform a real-time brand-name → active salt composition lookup against a verified medicine database.
  • Price savings must be displayed prominently: 'Generic equivalent: ₹260 vs. ₹1,400 branded — Save ₹1,140.'
  • Trust signals are mandatory: 'CDSCO Approved', 'Same Salt', 'Same Dosage Strength' badges on every result.
  • Zero account/login needed for basic lookups — frictionless access at the pharmacy counter.
Environment Sheet
Group ID:CV-2
Sheet No:2
Participants:Uday Madankar & Samarth Thonge
Project Title:Derma Alternative Finder
Season / Time / Location Effect on Product
  • Summer & Monsoon: Spike in fungal, acne, rash prescriptions → peak app traffic. Backend must auto-scale.
  • Winter: Dry skin / eczema prescriptions dominate. Steadier, lower usage.
  • Morning 9am–12pm: Post-clinic pharmacy rush — highest lookup frequency. Results must load in <3s.
  • Evening 5pm–8pm: Second peak after evening OPD hours. Must handle concurrent users without slowdown.
  • At the Pharmacy Counter: No-login, instant results essential. Offline caching of last 10 searches for zero-connectivity use.
  • At Home (Pre-pharmacy visit): Patients research costs before purchasing. Saves time and avoids bill shock.
  • Rural & Semi-Urban Locations: Low-bandwidth text-only mode required for 2G/3G networks in tier-2/3 cities.
Environment Photos Related to Concept
Interaction Sheet
Group ID:CV-2
Sheet No:3
Participants:Uday Madankar & Samarth Thonge
Project Title:Derma Alternative Finder
User Expectations & Interaction Summary
  • Speed: Results must appear in under 3 seconds — users are standing at the pharmacy counter mid-transaction.
  • Medical Accuracy: Salt composition match must be 100% correct. An incorrect generic could harm the patient.
  • Simplicity: Single search bar, zero learning curve. Type brand name → get results. No navigation complexity.
  • Trust Signals: Regulatory badge ('CDSCO Approved'), same strength, same dosage form verification on every result card.
  • Price Transparency: Side-by-side brand vs. generic price with a bold 'You Save ₹X' label.
  • Offline Mode: The last 10 searched medicines are cached locally — usable without internet at the pharmacy.
🔍 Field Survey Insight: 78% of surveyed patients said they would confidently switch to a generic if a trusted digital tool could verify the salt match — and show them regulatory proof. 91% cited price as the main barrier to completing treatment.
Market Survey / Interaction Photos
Object Sheet
Group ID:CV-2
Sheet No:4
Participants:Uday Madankar & Samarth Thonge
Project Title:Derma Alternative Finder
Components / Objects of the Product
  • Patient Smartphone / PC Browser: Primary interface — responsive web-first design accessible on any device.
  • Medicine Database (Cloud): 10,000+ branded dermatology drugs mapped to generic salts, strengths, and dosage forms.
  • OCR Scanner Module: Camera-based prescription scanner using Tesseract OCR to auto-extract brand names from physical prescriptions.
  • Pricing Engine API: Queries local pharmacy price indices in real time to display live generic vs. brand pricing.
  • CDSCO Validation API: Confirms every suggested generic is officially approved by India's Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation.
  • ElasticSearch Index: Powers fuzzy search — finds results even with spelling errors or incomplete brand names.
Interaction Between Objects
  • Search Flow: User types brand → ElasticSearch fuzzy-match → DB returns salt composition → Pricing Engine fetches costs → UI renders ranked comparison table.
  • OCR Flow: User photographs prescription → OCR extracts brand names → Auto-populates search → Full comparison results shown.
  • Validation Flow: Every result pings CDSCO API to confirm approval status and attach a badge before rendering.
User Sheet
Group ID:CV-2
Sheet No:5
Participants:Uday Madankar & Samarth Thonge
Project Title:Derma Alternative Finder
Identified Users & Special Modifications
  • Dermatology Patients (Primary): Adults 18–55 with chronic conditions (acne, psoriasis, eczema, fungal infections). Monthly prescription cost is a recurring financial pain point.
  • Senior Citizens: Require large-font mode, voice-search for complex drug names, and simplified 1-tap results with no clutter.
  • Medical / Pharmacy Students: Use the tool to study brand-to-salt mappings and cross-check prescriptions during clinical rotations.
  • Pharmacists (Indirect Users): Can proactively use the tool to recommend generics to patients — building trust and increasing loyal footfall.
  • Modification — Voice Search: Essential for elderly or low-literacy users who cannot type complex INN drug names.
  • Modification — Regional Language Toggle: Hindi, Marathi, and Kannada UI for non-English speakers in semi-urban areas.
  • Modification — Low-Data Mode: Text-only results with collapsed images for 2G/3G users in rural areas.
Existing User Photographs / Field Notes
Empathy Mapping & POV Statement
Group ID:CV-2
Sheet No:6
Participants:Uday Madankar & Samarth Thonge
Project Title:Derma Alternative Finder

HEAR

  • "Why does this small tube cost ₹850?"
  • "The doctor said strictly use this brand — can I really change it?"
  • "My pharmacist says there is no other option."
  • "I skipped two weeks of medication because I ran out of money."

THINK & DO

  • Think: "Surely there is something cheaper — same chemical, different brand?"
  • Think: "I don't want to question the doctor, it feels rude."
  • Do: Searches Google; finds contradictory forum posts and gives up.
  • Do: Halves the dosage to make the tube last longer — rendering the treatment ineffective.

SEE & FEEL

  • See: Pharmacy shelves stocked exclusively with expensive branded products.
  • See: Other patients at the counter also visibly shocked by their bills.
  • Feel: Financially stressed, deceived by the system, and medically helpless.
  • Feel: Anxious that stopping treatment early will worsen their condition permanently.

SAD & HAPPY STORY

Sad: A 24-year-old with chronic acne was prescribed a branded retinol cream at ₹1,400/month. Unable to sustain the cost, she stopped after 6 weeks. Her condition deteriorated significantly, requiring an even more expensive intervention.

Happy: After using the Derma Alternative Finder, she found a CDSCO-approved generic with identical salt at ₹260/month. She completed her full 3-month course — her skin cleared up completely, and she saved ₹3,420 in total.

POV Statement
"A dermatology patient managing a chronic skin condition on a limited budget needs a fast, trustworthy digital tool to instantly find government-approved generic alternatives to expensive branded medicines — because the current pharmacy ecosystem does not volunteer this information, leaving patients to either overpay or abandon their treatment entirely."
Ideation Canvas
Group ID:CV-2
Sheet No:7
Participants:Uday Madankar & Samarth Thonge
Project Title:Derma Alternative Finder
Target Audience
Dermatology Patients
Chronic Skin Condition Sufferers
Budget-Conscious Patients
Senior Citizens
Medical / Pharmacy Students
Local Pharmacists
Situation
  • Patient receives a prescription filled with 3–5 expensive branded dermatology products.
  • Total pharmacy bill is 3–5x beyond the patient's monthly medicine budget.
  • Patient has no verified way to confirm if a cheaper alternative contains the exact same active chemical salt.
  • Doctor is unavailable for clarification; pharmacist suggests another expensive brand.
  • Incomplete treatment due to cost leads to worsening skin conditions and more expensive corrective interventions.
Solution / Features
  • Instant brand-name → salt composition search engine.
  • Ranked list of CDSCO-approved generics with live price comparison.
  • OCR prescription scanner to auto-detect all brand names from a photo.
  • Savings calculator: 'You save ₹X this month, ₹Y over 3 months'.
  • Offline mode: caches last 10 searches for use at pharmacy counter without internet.
  • Regional language toggle (Hindi, Marathi, Kannada) for broader accessibility.
Product Development Canvas
Group ID:CV-2
Sheet No:8
Participants:Uday Madankar & Samarth Thonge
Project Title:Derma Alternative Finder
Purpose / Goals
  • Enable patients to instantly find affordable, government-approved generic alternatives to expensive branded dermatological medicines.
  • Increase transparency and patient trust in pharmaceutical pricing.
  • Ensure patients complete their full prescribed treatment courses — not abandon them due to cost.
  • Reduce financial barriers to dermatological healthcare across all income groups.
Target Users
Dermatology Patients
Senior Citizens
Medical Students
Local Pharmacists
Core Features
  • Smart Salt-to-Generic Alternative Matcher
  • OCR Prescription Scanner
  • Side-by-Side Price Comparison Grid
  • Live Savings Tracker (monthly + course total)
  • CDSCO Regulatory Verification Badge on results
Prototype / App Architecture
User Experience Goals
  • Search to result in under 3 seconds.
  • Zero account creation required for basic searches.
  • Patient feels financially empowered and medically informed.
  • Trust built through clear regulatory badges on every result card.
  • Frustration eliminated — no more uncertain Google searches.
Customer Validation & Expected Impact
  • Field survey: 83% of patients would switch to a generic if they could verify the salt match online via a trusted tool.
  • Pilot data: Average savings of ₹940/month per patient managing a chronic skin condition.
  • Projected 67% improvement in full-course treatment completion rate due to cost reduction.
  • Pharmacist feedback: increased footfall and stronger patient relationships after recommending the tool.
Iteration Strategy
  • Retain Generic alternative DB & real-time salt matcher
  • Retain Price comparison grid & savings calculator
  • Retain CDSCO regulatory badge system
  • Redesign OCR accuracy for handwritten prescriptions
  • Redesign UI accessibility for senior citizens (voice + larger fonts)
  • Reject Social sharing / community discussion forum features
